channel.title: Go on Jerry Tao
channel.description: Recent content in Go on Jerry Tao

item.title: Go Liveload With Docker And Gin
item.description: Just like ruby on rails, liveload changes. # Dockerfile FROM golang:1.9.1 # Install dep RUN curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/golang/dep/master/install.sh | sh WORKDIR /go/src/APP ADD Gopkg.toml Gopkg.toml ADD Gopkg.lock Gopkg.lock RUN dep ensure -vendor-only # Install gin RUN go get github.com/codegangsta/gin COPY ./src ./src WORKDIR /go/src/APP/src # App listen on 8888, gin proxy listen on 3000 EXPOSE 3000 CMD ["gin","-i","-a","8888","run"] # docker-compose-dev.yml version: '2.1' services: app: build: . command: gin -i -a 8888 run ports: - "127.
